title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Health & Glow Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Health & Glow Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Health & Glow Global Group in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Health & Glow Global Group:
Health & Glow Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow Global Group!
